assumptions: The question concerns the IFRS 9 classification and measurement of a financial asset.
The instrument is being assessed under the SPPI condition to determine its eligible subsequent measurement basis.

approaches.label: Amortised cost
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context states that a financial asset with contractual cash flows meeting the SPPI condition may be measured at amortised cost, subject to the business model condition.

approaches.label: Fair value through other comprehensive income
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context states that a financial asset with contractual cash flows meeting the SPPI condition may be measured at fair value through other comprehensive income, subject to the business model condition.

approaches.label: Fair value through profit or loss
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context states that if contractual cash flows could be significantly different from benchmark principal-and-interest cash flows, the asset cannot be measured at amortised cost or FVOCI and therefore is measured at fair value through profit or loss.
